docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-17-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENDRINA, JOHN INDIVIDUALLY, DBA HIGHLAND HILLS LENDING
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2008 - JUDGMENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK;S. VANTREE; NOT REPORTED (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY 18, 2010 ORDERED DESTROYED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY AFFOUMADO, SETH AS TO DEFENDANT ENDRINA, JOHN INDIVIDUALLY, DBA HIGHLAND HILLS LENDING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AFFOUMADO, SETH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ENDRINA, JOHN INDIVIDUALLY, DBA HIGHLAND HILLS LENDING JOHN ENDRINA, AN INDIVIDUAL. THE RESIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH PERSONAL LIABILITY FOR THIS CORPORATE OBLIGATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
